description: CompositionMagenta top made of 100% cotton, has a collar, short buttonable sleeves, full buttoned placket and a drawcords at the midriffFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this top with its plush fabric. The bright colour adds an interesting dimension to this basic top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a tonal jacket.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
